INSTALL$WELCOME_SUBTITLE: Set up models and your owner account — you can change everything later in Settings.
INSTALL$CHECKS_LEAD_PACKAGED: This build is missing required components. Download a fresh release or rebuild with npm run dist:desktop.
INSTALL$MODEL_PATH_SUBTITLE: Pick a default for the agent. Mock mode works with no API key.
INSTALL$PROVIDER_SUBTITLE: Keys stay on this machine. You can skip the key and add it in Settings later.
INSTALL$ACCOUNT_SUBTITLE: Secure this instance — additional users can be added later.
SETTINGS$LANGUAGE_HINT: Language for menus, buttons, and system apps. Chat responses follow the model.
APPS$APIS_INSTALLING_FROM_THE_MARKETPLAC:
Installing from the marketplace will pre-fill MCP server settings and request any keys
          from Key Wallet.
APPS$AGENTS_SUBTITLE: Mission control for agent personas — profile, approved models, memory grants, and document sets.
APPS$AGENTS_NO_MATCH_HINT: Try a different search term or filter, or create a new agent.
APPS$AGENTS_PROFILE_INTRO: Persona, avatar, and identity. Each agent has its own principal ID for memory isolation.
APPS$AGENTS_MODELS_INTRO: Approved models this agent may use. Default model is used when no override is set in chat.
APPS$AGENTS_MODELS_HINT: Per-agent model allowlists will be enforced at spawn time once the agent registry API ships.
APPS$AGENTS_MEMORY_INTRO: Memory principal and grants — what this agent can read and write in the memory store.
APPS$AGENTS_DOCUMENTS_INTRO: Markdown document set — soul, instructions, and persona files the agent loads into context.
APPS$AGENTS_NO_DOCUMENTS: No documents linked to this agent yet.
APPS$AGENTS_ACCESS_INTRO: Tools, policy, skills, and MCP servers this agent may use.
APPS$AGENTS_CREATE_DESC_PLACEHOLDER: What is this agent for? Describe its role and boundaries.
APPS$APPVIEW_THIS_APP_IS_NO_LONGER_INSTA: This app is no longer installed.
APPS$APPVIEW_THIS_APP_WAS_REMOVED_FROM_T: This app was removed from the registry.

APPS$AUTOMATIONS_THE_AUTOMATION_SERVICE_: The automation service is not reachable. Check that the server is running.
APPS$AUTOMATIONS_HEADLESS_RUNS_DENY_TOOL: Headless runs deny tools that need confirmation. Add explicit allow rules in Settings → Tools if needed.
APPS$AUTOMATIONS_ARCO_CAN_CREATE_THE_SCH: . Arco can create the schedule, write the prompt, and optionally set up delivery.
APPS$AUTOMATIONS_EVERY_WEEKDAY_AT_9AM_SU: every weekday at 9am, summarize my calendar and open tasks

APPS$IMAGEGEN_GENERATE_SOMETHING_TO_FILL: Generate something to fill the gallery.

APPS$KEY_WALLET_TRY_A_DIFFERENT_SEARCH_T: Try a different search term or filter.

APPS$KEY_WALLET_SAVING_KEYS_FROM_THE_WAL:
Saving keys from the wallet will land once the secrets vault API ships. For now, add MCP
        env vars in Settings → MCP servers or set the model key under Settings → Model provider.

APPS$PAY_EACH_PROVIDER_IMPLEMENTS_A_SHAR:
Each provider implements a shared adapter contract. The gateway routes send, request, and
            balance calls — swap stub adapters for Stripe SDK, PayPal REST, Plaid Link, or wallet connect.

APPS$STARTUP_SECURE_THIS_INSTANCE_ADDITI: Secure this instance — additional users can be invited later.

APPS$STARTUP_DOWNLOAD_HAPPENS_IN_THE_BAC: Download happens in the background. Tool-calling models work best with Arco's agent.

APPS$STUDIO_HOSTED_BROWSE_HINT: Browse folders on this server — not your local machine.

APPS$STUDIO_NO_GENERATED_APPS_YET_ASK_TH: No generated apps yet — ask the agent to build one.

Card shells ported from UI Experiments — DesignCard, GlassWidget, StatCard, Finance, Banking, and
                Fitness primitives.

APPS$APIS_SAVED_INTEGRATIONS_AND_A_CURAT: Saved integrations and a curated marketplace of MCP servers, REST connectors, and third-party tools. Installed APIs expose tools to the agent and may require keys from Key Wallet.
APPS$AUTOMATIONS_SCHEDULED_AND_EVENT_TRI: Scheduled and event-triggered agent runs. Each automation gets only its prompt — no chat history — and can deliver results to a channel.
APPS$CHAT_ASK_ARCO_TO_BUILD_AUTOMATE_OR_: Ask Arco to build, automate, or explain…
APPS$KEY_WALLET_EVERY_CREDENTIAL_ARCO_US: Every credential Arco uses — LLM vendors, MCP servers, channels, model refs, and ACP agents. Names match env vars so saved keys reach the right subprocess.
APPS$LONGFORMER_GENERATE_A_SUMMARY_FROM_: Generate a summary from your transcript, then edit here…
APPS$MODELS_EVERY_MODEL_THE_OS_USES_ASSI: Every model the OS uses — assign use-cases, download local models, connect providers.
APPS$MODELS_SERVE_DOWNLOADED_MODELS_LOCA: Serve downloaded models locally via llama-server
APPS$MODELS_MODEL_ID_AS_THE_ENDPOINT_EXP: Model id (as the endpoint expects it)
APPS$MODELS_API_KEY_OPTIONAL_STORED_MASK: API key (optional — stored masked in Settings)
APPS$MUSIC_PASTE_MUSIC_BLOG_RSS_FEED_URL: Paste music blog RSS feed URL
APPS$MUSIC_WHAT_DO_YOU_WANT_TO_PLAY: What do you want to play?
APPS$NOTES_START_WRITING_OR_TYPE_FOR_BLO: Start writing, or type / for blocks…
APPS$ONBOARDING_REUSABLE_STEP_FLOWS_FOR_: Reusable step flows for empty states, banners, and side panels.
APPS$SEARCH_ADDRESS_BAR_EDIT_URL_OR_SEAR: Address bar — edit URL or search term
APPS$SETTINGS_CLICK_TO_CYCLE_AUTO_CONFIR: Click to cycle auto → confirm → deny
APPS$SETTINGS_MANAGE_INSTALLED_APPS_PERM: Manage installed apps, permissions, and agent tools contributed by each app.
APPS$SETTINGS_TALK_TO_THE_AGENT_FROM_TEL: Talk to the agent from Telegram on your phone. Unknown senders get a pairing code — approve them below before their messages are processed. Automations can deliver results to approved chats too.
APPS$SETTINGS_ACCOUNTS_LINKED_TO_GROUPS_: Accounts linked to Groups and Social workspaces. OAuth and server-side token storage replace local stubs in a later phase.
APPS$SETTINGS_READ_ONLY_TOKENS_NEVER_SEE: Read-only tokens never see write tools
APPS$SETTINGS_EXTERNAL_TOOL_PROVIDERS_MO: External tool providers (Model Context Protocol). Tools from running servers join the agent; writes ask for approval unless you set a policy rule.
APPS$SETTINGS_VECTOR_BACKENDS_EMBEDDING_: Vector backends, embedding models, and which agents may read or write each memory kind. Server wiring lands in Phase 1–2.
APPS$SETTINGS_CHANGE_YOUR_PASSWORD_OTHER: Change your password. Other active sessions will be signed out.
APPS$SETTINGS_WHICH_IMPLEMENTATION_ANSWE: Which implementation answers each system capability. Data stays in the system store, so switching providers never loses anything.
APPS$SETTINGS_CHOOSE_WHICH_AGENT_RUNTIME: Choose which agent runtime handles chat. Cursor uses the Cursor SDK; external ACP agents bring their own model and tools.
APPS$SETTINGS_PROVIDER_SETTINGS_APPLY_TO: Provider settings apply to the built-in agent and automations. This section mirrors the Agent & Chat slot in the Models app, where every model the OS uses — voice and local models included — is managed.
APPS$SETTINGS_THEME_TYPOGRAPHY_SPACING_A: Theme, typography, spacing, assistant face, and background for the desktop and sign-in screen.
APPS$SETTINGS_CREATE_ACCOUNTS_ASSIGN_ROL: Create accounts, assign roles, and reset passwords. The server enforces owner-protection rules.
APPS$SKILLS_INSTRUCTION_FILES_THE_AGENT_: Instruction files the agent reads on demand. The prompt only carries the index; the agent pages in a skill's full instructions when a task calls for it.
APPS$SKILLS_WHEN_SHOULD_THE_AGENT_READ_T: When should the agent read this?
APPS$STUDIO_ASK_THE_AGENT_TO_BUILD_SCRIP: Ask the agent to build, script, or automate…
APPS$STUDIO_ADD_THIS_APP_TO_THE_DOCK: Add this app to the dock
APPS$STUDIO_START_A_DEV_SERVER_E_G_NPM_S: Start a dev server… e.g. npm start
APPS$TASKS_SEARCH_CONTACTS_OR_ENTER_A_NA: Search contacts or enter a name
COMPONENTS$PATTERNS_PASTE_TOKEN_OAUTH_RE: Paste token — OAuth replaces this later
OS_COMMANDPALETTE_SEARCH_APPS_SETTINGS_O: Search apps, settings, or shell mode…

APPS$AUTOMATIONS_CATALOG_DASHBOARD_REFRE: Refresh live dashboard apps with the latest data on a schedule.
APPS$AUTOMATIONS_CATALOG_GITHUB_PR_REVIE: Review new pull requests when they open and post a concise summary.

APPS$AUTOMATIONS_CATALOG_STANDUP_DIGEST_: Collect standup notes and deliver a digest to a channel.
